description: Triggers when the user wants to create a structured, wikilinked Obsidian note from raw content or ideas

queries.query: turn this brain dump into a proper Obsidian concept note
create a meeting note from today's Q2 planning session summary
build a reference note for the book Thinking Fast and Slow
extract entities from this text and add wikilinks to create an Obsidian note
add this article to my vault as a structured note
this note is too long, split it into atomic Zettelkasten notes
create an Obsidian project note for Initiative Orion
build a well-structured note about systems thinking for my vault
import this email into my Obsidian vault as a reference note
create a note about the new team member and link it to relevant project notes
add frontmatter tags to my existing note
find broken wikilinks in my vault
draw a flowchart for the user registration process
optimize my resume for a software engineering role
create a bash script to archive old Obsidian notes
summarize this YouTube video
create an Excalidraw diagram for the system architecture
transcribe this audio file to Markdown
what is the best PKM system for academics?
write a Python script to read and process a CSV file
